case_title: DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. TIARA LARKIN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAMOND STATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LARKIN, TIARA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-09-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-09-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-25-2004
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-09-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-09-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST CHARLES L. OLOBRI, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-09-2004 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-24-2004. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SUSAN LEE. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-09-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2004 CONTINUED TO JUL-21-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-19-2004 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST CHARLES L. OLOBRI, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAY-19-2004, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-03-2004. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-21-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
